title: GBA (Young Brains Academy Application and Research Center) Director's Message
content:
GBA (Young Brains Academy Application and Research Center) Director's Message

The Young Brains Academy, which was established with the approval of YÖK as an innovative model both in our country and in Europe in order to produce projects that create awareness, realize entrepreneurial ideas and create value with participatory democracy and a supra-political management model; in parallel with the developments in the world; It realizes important projects on what kind of vision institutions should have in every field, especially national science policies.

In this context, national and international grant funds;

To ensure that projects are produced in accordance with the hierarchy of needs between projects in order to ensure savings and efficiency,

To help promote all grant programs that our country can benefit from and prepare projects in this context,

Helping to develop projects for EU and global grant funds,

Providing project leadership and consultancy to institutions and organizations that want to prepare projects,

To follow the publications of grant-giving organizations in order to ensure the success of the projects,

To evaluate the requests for finding suitable partners submitted by public institutions and non-governmental organizations and to assist these organizations in finding suitable partners to the extent possible,

To ensure that projects are carried out by using national and international grant funds, to increase interest in domestic and foreign projects and programs, to share the mutual knowledge, experience and technologies of the countries through projects, to bring new developments and scientific dimension in public administration and civil society to our country,

Strengthening inter-institutional cooperation and establishing partnerships by carrying out the necessary work to make Istanbul a pioneer and leader in project work in terms of quantity and quality.

To produce projects that create awareness and realize entrepreneurial ideas

We invite scientists, young entrepreneurs, private and legal entities to work on a project basis.

Sincerely yours,

Prof. Dr. Lecturer Member Nebiye YAŞAR

Young Minds Academy Director
